violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Fan in window, small clip fan near prep area, and fans in walk-in cooler in need of cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. - Plastic sleeves of to-go containers on floor in basement. All single use items need to be stored off the floor. 6" not required. A pallet or inverted crate is fine.
Toilet facilities. — --- Toilet rooms not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
